'Social Media and Refugee Crisis' Book Published by Ibn Haldun University Press

27.05.2022

Media and Communication Department faculty member Dr. Yasmin Aldamen's work titled 'Social Media and the Refugee Crisis' met with readers among Ibn Haldun University Press.

Media and Communication Department faculty member Dr. Yasmin Aldamen's work titled 'Social Media and the Refugee Crisis' met with readers among Ibn Haldun University Press.

Interested people can get the book from selected bookstores and online book sales websites.
